questionHtml: State what is meant by a frame of reference.
markschemeHtml:
set of coordinates/axes to record position and time «of an event»

OR

a coordinate system which is at rest/not moving relative to the observer ✓

 

Some mention of time and position for MP1

Allow “set of clocks and rulers” as per MP1

meta.title: State what is meant by a frame of reference.
